market: The KOSPI is showing moderate volatility this Monday morning, balancing tech caution with energy sector strength. Investors are closely watching the impact of global supply chain adjustments on major chip manufacturers, while defense and energy stocks show resilience.
art: The art scene is entering the week with anticipation for the upcoming Art OnO 2026 fair. Galleries are finalizing selections, with a noted emphasis on sustainable materials and emerging digital-physical hybrid works. Collector interest remains cautious but selective, favoring established names over speculative pieces.
